deck: ~19 cards — Noxious Fumes, Wraith Form, Accuracy, Infinite Blades, Escape Plan, Cloak and Dagger (unupgraded), Bane, Slice, Dagger Throw, Strike x2, Defend x3, Survivor, Neutralize
relics: Ring of the Snake, Vajra, Eternal Feather, others
cause_of_death: The Guardian at 155/240 HP (65% remaining). Guardian was 8 damage from Mode Shift trigger on Turn 9, which would have cancelled the lethal 5x4=20 attack. At 2 HP with -7 Dex, all block cards gave 0 block.
key_moments: **WRAITH FORM PLAYED TOO EARLY -- THIRD DEATH FROM THIS MISTAKE.** Wraith Form played Turn 2 of Guardian fight (possibly due to card index confusion -- player intended Neutralize at index 5 but played Wraith Form). By Turn 8, Dex was -6 (Defend = 0 block). By Turn 9, Dex was -7. All Skill-based block was worthless for the final 4+ turns.

**Unupgraded Cloak and Dagger cost the run.** On the final turn, player needed 40 damage to trigger Mode Shift. With upgraded CaD (2 Shivs), total damage would have been 41 (2 Shivs from hand + 2 Shivs from CaD+ + Slice + Strike = 9+9+9+9+7+7 = 50, exceeding threshold). With unupgraded CaD (1 Shiv), actual damage was only 32 (2 Shivs + 1 CaD Shiv + Slice + Strike = 9+9+9+7+7 = 41... wait, actual was 2 Shivs from hand + Slice + Strike = 9+9+7+7 = 32). Short by 8.

**Noxious Fumes was never played in the boss fight.** The card was in the deck but never drawn or played during the Guardian fight. If played Turn 1 (free turn), it would have dealt 36+ total poison damage over 9 turns, potentially killing the Guardian before the crisis.
**Smoke Bomb saved the run from a lethal Gremlin Gang fight at F14.** At 19 HP with 38 incoming and max 16 block, escape was the only option. Correct use of the potion.

**Entered boss at 26/70 HP (37%)**, well below the 70% threshold. Rested at campfire before boss but only recovered to ~49 HP; took 22 unblocked from a 7x4=28 attack on the first attack turn (Dex already -2).
**Turn 7 appears to have been skipped** -- stream events jump from Turn 6 end to Turn 8 analysis at HP 17 with Guardian at 202/240 HP. Possible automation issue.

Sharp Hide + negative Dex interaction was devastating: during Defensive Mode, every Attack costs 3 HP from Sharp Hide AND block from Skills was 0. The player correctly identified that only potions bypass Sharp Hide.
lessons: **Wraith Form early play is now a THREE-DEATH pattern** (Runs 156, 158-era guidance, 164). The playbook warning was updated after Run 158 but the player still played it Turn 2. Promoted to mechanics.md as a FUNDAMENTAL RULE alongside X-cost card and kill-math rules. The rule is now: "Do NOT play Wraith Form until the enemy is within 5 turns of dying."

**Cloak and Dagger upgrade is critical when Guardian is the boss.** The 1-Shiv vs 2-Shiv difference is 9 damage per play with Accuracy. Created cloak-and-dagger.md with Guardian-specific upgrade guidance.
**Noxious Fumes must be played ASAP in boss fights.** Powers provide cumulative value -- every turn of delay costs exponential damage. Added "Power Card Priority in Boss Fights" to mechanics.md.
**Smoke Bomb is excellent Act 1 insurance** against Gremlin Gang at low HP. Updated smoke-bomb.md.
**Guardian Silent-specific strategy added** to the-guardian.md covering Mode Shift + Shiv interactions, Wraith Form timing, and Poison Potion Sharp Hide bypass.
